name: Print a 1337-string...
input:
The first line contains one integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 10$) — the number of queries.
Next $t$ lines contains a description of queries: the $i$-th line contains one integer $n_i$ ($1 \le n_i \le 10^9$).
output: For the $i$-th query print one string $s_i$ ($1 \le |s_i| \le 10^5$) consisting of digits $\{1, 3, 7\}$. String $s_i$ must have exactly $n_i$ subsequences $1337$. If there are multiple such strings, print any of them.
